# flags

**Instance Property**

The flags associated with the `CVTime` value. See [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/cvtime-values] for possible values. If `kCVTimeIsIndefinite` is set, you should not use any of the other fields in this structure.

## Declaration

```swift
var flags: Int32
```

## Properties

- **timeScale**: The time scale for this value.
- **timeValue**: The time value.

items.description: The time scale for this value.
items.name: timeScale
